title: melia azedarach var. australasica
intro: Melia azedarach var. australasica, also known as the Australian neem tree, is a variant of the Melia azedarach tree, native to Australia and New Caledonia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are derived from its seeds and leaves. The health benefits of Melia azedarach var. australasica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
